rationale: GATE preparation requires intense focus, data clarity, and functional utility over decorative flair. The Swiss & High-Contrast archetype (adapted for a dark-first 'Notion' aesthetic) provides a structured, distraction-free environment ideal for late-night study sessions, complex problem solving, and dense data tracking.

layout.sidebar: w-64 fixed h-screen border-r border-border bg-surface/50 backdrop-blur-xl
layout.card_style: bg-surface border border-border rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm hover:border-border/80 transition-colors

components.buttons: rounded-md font-medium transition-all focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 hover:-translate-y-[1px]
components.inputs: bg-transparent border border-border rounded-md focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary h-10 px-3

question_viewer.solution_inline: mt-4 p-4 bg-surface/50 border-l-2 border-primary rounded-r-md text-sm
question_viewer.notes_area: mt-4 w-full p-3 bg-transparent border border-dashed border-border rounded-md focus:border-primary/50 text-sm

components.mistake_tags: px-2 py-1 text-xs font-mono rounded-full border border-border/50 bg-surface
components.video_player: w-full aspect-video rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-border bg-black

hero_background.description: Dark abstract wavy lines for login or empty states background overlay

strict_rules: NEVER compute a combined subject completion percentage.
NEVER merge Question Bank with PYQs.
NEVER use manual topic statuses (e.g. 'Done', 'In Progress'). Metrics only.
Solutions MUST appear inline beneath the question (no modals, no new pages, no PDF viewers).
YouTube videos MUST play inside the platform via IFrame API.
All components MUST use Shadcn UI principles but customized for an information-dense 'Notion' feel.
MUST use data-testid for all interactive and key informational elements.
